message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ActorBorderColor black
  ActorFontColor black
  ParticipantBorderColor black
  ParticipantFontColor black
  LifeLineBorderColor gray
  LifeLineBackgroundColor white
  BoxBorderColor black
  BoxBackgroundColor white
  ArrowColor black
  ArrowThickness 1
  MessageAlign left
}

actor "Crapchat user" as U1
actor "Another Crapchat user" as U2
participant "Crapchat REST API" as API
participant "Crapchat identity provider" as IDP
database "Crapchat storage" as DB

box "Search user" #white
  U1 ->> API : HTTP POST request with search query
  activate API
  API ->> IDP : HTTP request with search query
  activate IDP
  IDP -->> API : HTTP response with list of users
  deactivate IDP
  API -->> U1 : HTTP response with array of users
  deactivate API
end box

box "Send follow request" #white
  U1 -> U1 : Clicks follow button
  U1 ->> API : HTTP request with ID of the user to follow
  activate API
  API -> DB : SQL insert query
  activate DB
  DB --> API : Success response
  deactivate DB
  API -> U2 : Notify with follow request
  API -->> U1 : HTTP OK response
  deactivate API
end box

box "Accept follow request" #white
  U2 ->> API : HTTP request to accept
  activate API
  API -> DB : SQL update query
  activate DB
  DB --> API : Success response
  deactivate DB
  API -->> U2 : HTTP OK response
  deactivate API
end box
@enduml
